race.comment: ABRAHAM (1) finally got the maiden win out of the way over this course and distance last time out and will have derived a bunch of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Winning hoop Guthmann-Chester sticks in the saddle and can go back-to-back without surprising. SAVEUR (11) had been plying her trade in harder Sydney metro contests before breaking the maiden status at the Gold Coast at her latest outing. Can go right on with the job now. CANARA (6) doesn't win out of turn but has placed two from two around this circuit and must be respected out of the champion Waller yard. Should be hitting the line with gusto. KURITHEA (8) is one from one over this track and trip and looks one for the exotics players. PISTON REBEL (3) next best from the favourable draw.
